content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns despite significant bait. The client opens with externalized blame ('they don't see me') — a clear invitation to either validate the surface complaint (empathic mirroring trap) or to make family dynamics the story. The coach refuses both: turn 4 and 6 test the externalization rather than validating it, and turn 10's pivot to the father is brief and instrumental rather than building a family-history narrative. The coach does not fix, advise, or evangelize methodology terminology. Confrontational questions (turns 12, 26, 30, 32) come from impartial structural curiosity, not from agenda to prove the client wrong — the coach has no skin in the outcome. Turn 22 explicitly names the avoidance ('you didn't answer the question') without extracting an apology, and follows live wonder rather than pursuing rigor punitively. No loving-to-transform escalation, no view-as-technique (questions land warmly and in context), no fight with the inner critic, no safety-as-control. Positive avoidance of the empathic-mirroring trap is sustained throughout.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 22, 26, 30, 34, 38],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to validate 'they don't see me'; tests the claim instead — avoids empathic-mirroring trap."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Mirror-the-judgment move without methodology language; flips premise without lecturing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Touches father history but keeps it instrumental — avoids dont-make-family-dynamics-the-story."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'how is that not true about you' question delivered with warmth ('scary question for me to ask') — not view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection without extracting apology; honors wonder over rigor — avoids interrogation tone."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pulls criteria into present-moment relationship; confrontation from impartiality, not agenda."},
    {"turn": 34, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Direct logical conclusion 'so they are seeing you' — no softening to placate, no fixing."},
    {"turn": 38, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Speaks the want for her ('I just want it') — no advice, no transformation push."},
    {"turn": 42, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinction question about empowerment without labeling as limiting belief."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["mirror-the-judgment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "what-if-they-did-see-you", "how-is-that-not-true-about-you", "empowered-vs-power", "judgment-vs-discernment"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Clean refusal of the empathic-validation bait throughout. No anti-patterns tripped."
}
